 \A S :

     \E A \in SUBSET S :
       \A x \in S :
         f [x] # A

item.text: I’ll start with the standard diagonal set proof and let TLAPS identify any granularity gaps.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "apply_patch <<'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: Cantor4_cantor.tla
@@
 PROOF OBVIOUS
+PROOF
+  TAKE S
+  <1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW f \\in [S -> SUBSET S]
+                PROVE  \\E A \\in SUBSET S : \\A x \\in S : f[x] # A
+    OBVIOUS
+  <1>2. DEFINE A == {x \\in S : x \\notin f[x]}
+  <1>3. A \\in SUBSET S
+    OBVIOUS
+  <1>4. \\A x \\in S : f[x] # A
+  PROOF
+    <2>1. TAKE x \\in S
+    <2>2. SUFFICES ASSUME f[x] = A
+                  PROVE  FALSE
+      OBVIOUS
+    <2>3. x \\in f[x] <=> x \\in A
+      BY <2>2
+    <2>4. x \\in A <=> x \\notin f[x]
+      BY <2>1 DEF A
+    <2>5. FALSE
+      BY <2>3, <2>4
+    <2> QED
+      BY <2>2, <2>5
+  <1>5. QED
+    BY <1>3, <1>4
*** End Patch
PATCH
~/.tlapm15/bin/tlapm -I ~/.tlapm15/lib/tlaps Cantor4_cantor.tla"

/bin/zsh -lc "apply_patch <<'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: Cantor4_cantor.tla
@@
 PROOF OBVIOUS
+PROOF
+  TAKE S
+  <1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW f \\in [S -> SUBSET S]
+                PROVE  \\E A \\in SUBSET S : \\A x \\in S : f[x] # A
+    OBVIOUS
+  <1>2. DEFINE A == {x \\in S : x \\notin f[x]}
+  <1>3. A \\in SUBSET S
+    OBVIOUS
+  <1>4. \\A x \\in S : f[x] # A
+  PROOF
+    <2>1. TAKE x \\in S
+    <2>2. SUFFICES ASSUME f[x] = A
+                  PROVE  FALSE
+      OBVIOUS
+    <2>3. x \\in f[x] <=> x \\in A
+      BY <2>2
+    <2>4. x \\in A <=> x \\notin f[x]
+      BY <2>1 DEF A
+    <2>5. FALSE
+      BY <2>3, <2>4
+    <2> QED
+      BY <2>2, <2>5
+  <1>5. QED
+    BY <1>3, <1>4
*** End Patch
PATCH
~/.tlapm15/bin/tlapm -I ~/.tlapm15/lib/tlaps Cantor4_cantor.tla"

item.text: The placeholder line remained, causing a parse issue; I’m replacing it cleanly and rerunning.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba Cantor4_cantor.tla | sed -n '1,80p'
apply_patch <<'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: Cantor4_cantor.tla
@@
-PROOF OBVIOUS
 PROOF
*** End Patch
PATCH
